ops.note: Already held before this change and re-verified: iOS never built a per-item tally strip — SubmitBarView renders only the aggregate "k/D decided" text + Submit (SubmitBarView.swift body), which is the same always-visible analog web keeps in focus mode (web's showTally gates only the per-item .tally-strip). One per-item rail per screen: the FocusProgressView dot rail. SubmitBarView deliberately untouched by 771aaeeb.
